title: 日本ダービーにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Japanese Derby, the second
race on our Triple Crown tour.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The venue feels tense and heavy. Tokai Teio tries
to keep her spirits up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She states she'll win the Japanese Derby and
heads off to the track... all for the sake of
surpassing Symboli Rudolf!
